item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i guess
don't usually have to worry about lines at my local chipotles
what could go wrong?
finally
i'm known for doing this to people
i don't like it
no. only to see some childhood pets but beside that would be weird
always the clown
this is tough they all sound pretty sweet
i did not take this pic i want no part of this
but it's just so low rez!
something something anakin
who doesn't?
mmm hmm
it's not exciting
as is tradition
that's my time, have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Very well played! This should be the norm, if you're not allowed to work from home, don't!! Unless you're a doctor on call, in which case, please answer your phone! Lol
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: COMIC CON!
item.description: BRITISH FOLK AND OTHERS VISITING…COME FIND ME THIS WEEKEND AT COMIC CON AND SAY HI. I look crazy awkward in real life so that will be fun. xD You get to see my big snoz and chubby face in person. Please talk to me! Last time someone just took a photo and walked away, that was pretty awkward for me xD xD love you and can’t wait to see any of you there.
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: Exactly this!!! Going no contact happens for a reason, stop pressuring people to talk to the toxic people in their lives. No matter who the fuck it is!

item.title: Another Round of Rejected Cartoons
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: Thought he had the shits…I was so wrong.
item.description: We met at work decades ago and just got along like peas and carrots. Never any hint of sexual tensions and I always loved that I felt completely relaxed and could talk about anything with him with absolutely no weirdness. A few years ago we both moved a few states away and lost touch. I was recently recounting how lucky I was to find a true male friend with no sexual expectations. That mutual friend dropped the bomb that my guy jerked it before we hung out every single time, so he could just be cool. Honestly, I’m thankful I didn’t know at the time. But thinking back I’m really glad he did, it made for a really great friendship!
item.dc:creator: eyebrowarchedinconcern

item.title: When your boss asks you to prove you’re sick

item.title: Hexia Sketchia
item.description: Wanted to brush up on my expression skills so took lots of broody reference pictures holding a mop for some inspiration If you'd like to support me and see the booba version: https://www.patreon.com/miaormoa If you'd like to commission me or simply donate : https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella I’m going to be at comic con this weekend so busy busy
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: The time the Jeopardy! clue writers got tricked by a meme
item.description:
Does this sound right to you?
They were so confident in their facts that they proudly tweeted out the clue they used, tagging the official Tetris account. https://twitter.com/Jeopardy/status/1181313245795106818
Tetris's response. https://twitter.com/i/status/1181323129110646784
The shitpost that started it all. It went on to go viral on several social sites. https://twitter.com/vecchitto/status/1099748313862234114
This page is NOT in the manual, lol. https://www.retrogames.cz/manualy/NES/Tetris_(Nintendo)_-_NES_-_Manual.pdf
item.dc:creator: hetnkik999

item.title: Happy Pizza Month!
item.description: I didn't even know it was pizza month! Thank you pizza guy for letting me know. Was that the Tony Hawk video game? I wonder what Tony is up to these days.
item.dc:creator: 13andido

item.title: Today's kitten petting videos.
item.description:
Graymalkin getting a belly rub!
Look at that fat kitten belly!
Yelly von Hollerlots enjoying being petted.
Yelly and Black Shuck.
Siblings. Graymalkin, Yelly von Hollerlots and Black Shuck are all littermates. Their mom is solid black and completely feral. Fortunately, I've gotten her babies domesticated and where they can be picked up and handled. I'm hoping I can find homes for them.
This is Weasel out for a stroll with Honcho and I. He just showed up a while back and made himself at home. He doesn't appear to have a mom and he's a bit older than my kitten trio. He's usually hanging out with them, but he decided following Honcho would be fun.
item.dc:creator: PacManDreaming

item.title: Imgur community asked for pictures of me in a dirndl and I’ll give it to the .
item.description:
I made this post a little while back: https://imgur.com/gallery/pWXIs88 aThe community asked to see me in my dirndl outfit.
Well, I’m not good at photoshop so here it is with my face removed.
To give perspective I’m 6ft 3in (193cm or almost two meter sticks tall) and I am a weightlifter as well as an avid runner.
No clue who these women were. None of them groped me.
item.dc:creator: Hotsauceman
